ground_truth.title: Official Nintendo Direct Partner Showcase February 2024 Discussion Thread
ground_truth.author: Need2KnowLion
ground_truth.main_content:
Need2KnowLion
#1

No YT stream link this time. The VOD will just go up on their channel in exactly 1 hour from now.

Mr-McMonkeyDog
#2

I don't know if the timing is unusual but the fact that this is so early makes me feel like it's gonna kick ass, and they want to really own the news cycle today.

I'm ready!!
